title: Clear Hitboxes
description: ClearHitboxes adds Customisation to Debug Hitboxes (F3+B)
body:
This Project is Fabric only. 1.20.2+ is currently in development. Thanks for understanding

Versions 1.19.3 and up require Fabric API

Versions 1.19-1.19.2 require Cloth Config API and ModMenu.

Version 1.18 and lower require Fabric API and ModMenu for settings.

Clear hitboxes is a Mod that allows customization of Debug Hitboxes (F3+b). Whether you are bored of the Vanilla look, Want something that stands out in PVP or want unique colors for Technical Minecraft, this mod has it all.

Features

  • Reduced Vanilla hitboxes for a clean look
  • Change the color of hitboxes to whatever you want
  • Includes transparency slider
  • Chroma features; both static and gradient mode
  • Chroma speed and saturation
  • Reduced hitbox line size
